ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "ma_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing authorization holder */,
  "vm_number" TEXT /* Veterinary medicine number */,
  "active_substances_id" INTEGER /* ID of the active substances */,
  "target_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target species */,
  "distribution_category" TEXT /* Distribution category (e.g., POM-V) */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "aligned_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aligned product */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of product registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Primary medical indication for the product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form in which the product is administered (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "pack_size" TEXT /* Size of the product packaging */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for traceability */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_active_substances_id FOREIGN KEY ("active_substances_id") REFERENCES active_substances ("active_substances_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_ma_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("ma_holder_id") REFERENCES marketing_authorization_holders ("ma_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_distribution_category FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_category") REFERENCES distribution_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_aligned_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("aligned_product_id") REFERENCES aligned_products ("aligned_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_target_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_species_id") REFERENCES target_species ("target_species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_authorization_holders" (
  "ma_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing authorization holder */,
  "ma_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing authorization holder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the marketing authorization holder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the marketing authorization holder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the marketing authorization holder */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the marketing authorization holder */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the marketing authorization holder is based */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number with regulatory authorities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "active_substances" (
  "active_substances_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each active substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the active substance */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the active substance */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the active substance in the product */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the active substance */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry (IUPAC) name of the active substance */,
  "safety_data_sheet" TEXT /* File path to the safety data sheet (SDS) for the active substance */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the active substance information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the active substance information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("active_substances_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_species" (
  "target_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the target species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the target species */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the target species information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the target species information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the territory is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the territory is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the territory */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the territory information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the territory information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_categories" (
  "distribution_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution category (e.g., POM-V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distribution category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the distribution category */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the distribution category information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aligned_products" (
  "aligned_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aligned product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base product */,
  "aligned_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aligned territory */,
  "alignment_date" TEXT /* Date of product alignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alignment (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  "alignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the product alignment */,
  "alignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the alignment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the alignment information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the alignment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aligned_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aligned_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aligned_products_aligned_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("aligned_territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last changed their password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the product variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the product variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the product variant (e.g., strength, formulation) */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging for the variant */,
  "variant_code" TEXT /* Code for the product variant */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variant information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory document */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., registration, compliance) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_hash" TEXT /* Hash value for document integrity verification */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_documents_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_status_changes" (
  "status_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose status changed */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Old status of the product */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the product */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the status change */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status change information */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_status_changes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_status_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
